title: Create: Evil Awake
description: ⚡Create-based modpack with combat mods and bosses!🔥
body:
![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/s4aXRwm.png) --- ![Status - In Development](https://img.shields.io/badge/Status-Archived-red?style=for-the-badge) ![Version - 1.3.3](https://img.shields.io/badge/Version/Minecraft-1.3.5/1.19.2-red?style=for-the-badge) ![Loader - Forge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Forge-red?style=for-the-badge) [![4EEZE#6261](https://img.shields.io/badge/4EEZE%236261-grey?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord)](https://discordid.netlify.app/?id=617963753610280976) [![Issues](https://img.shields.io/badge/Issues-grey?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/4EEZE/Create-Evil-Awake/issues) ![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/wKyEN0J.png) ### Create: Evil Awake is a modpack based on Create and combat mods with bosses, unique gameplay and atmosphere, optimization and fast support. --- ![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/yKYqMXK.png) ### Because we have: ### 📱Custom and unique menu!📱 ### 💿Custom loading screen!💿 ### ✨Cool Design!✨ ### 🥇Well-chosen mods!🥇 ### 🏹More than 100 kinds of armor and more than 30 kinds of weapons!🏹 ### 🎃Unique bosses and mini bosses!🎃 ### 🌳Cool atmosphere!🌳 --- ![Imgur](https://i.imgur.com/hzffWFM.png) # 💽System Requirements💾
What if I have low FPS?
- If you have low FPS, try disabling/removing the mod. **Sound Physics Remastered** (realistic behavior of sounds in the game). **[Great performance boost]** - Turn off the lush foliage. This can be done by moving the resource pack for disabling above the others. **[Great performance boost]** - If you have low FPS, try disabling/removing the mod **Falling Leaves** (falling leaves from trees). **[Small performance boost]** These instructions should help you to increase your FPS.
System Requirements MIN/REC
### Minimum system requirements - OS: **Windows 7/8/10, macOS, Linux** - RAM: **5 — 6 GB** - GPU: **NVIDIA GeForce 400 Series or similar AMD card with OpenGL 4.4 support** - CPU: **Intel Core i3 or similar AMD processor** ### Recommended system requirements - OS: **Windows 7/8/10, macOS, Linux** - RAM: **6 — 8 GB** - GPU: **NVIDIA GeForce 700 Series or similar AMD card with OpenGL 4.5 support** - CPU: **Intel Core i5 or similar AMD processor**
--- [![Nullscape](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fuser-images.githubusercontent.com%2F63272345%2F224808975-6d3866c1-a968-4fa1-a1c1-6d9318e42ed9.png&n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/nullscape) [![Undead Unleashed](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fi.ibb.co%2FPhwsN2n%2F2023-06-24-10-57-3111.png&n=-1)](https://modrinth.com/mod/undead-unleashed) [![Integrated API](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/612/340/apibanner1.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/integrated-api) [![More Villagers](https://i.imgur.com/rgWbKwC.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-villagers) [![Legendary Tooltips](https://i.imgur.com/TJfJlnx.gif)](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips) [![Alex's Armoury](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/572/728/logo_alternate_blue_gradient_clear.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-armoury) [![Effective](https://github.com/Ladysnake/Effective/blob/main/title.png?raw=true)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effective) [![Knight Quest](https://i.imgur.com/zfjoYar.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/knight-quest) [![The conjurer](https://cdn.moddinglegacy.com/277654121008126804-The_Conjurer_Promo.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-conjurer)
